name: Black & Veatch Holding Co.
h1: Black & Veatch's GCC footprint in India
lede: Black & Veatch runs two centers across two Indian cities. Mumbai and Pune, covering engineering & design, built over 29 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Black & Veatch office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Black & Veatch GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Black & Veatch runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Mumbai, Pune), covering engineering & design. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Black & Veatch's India footprint covers Mumbai and Pune, spanning engineering & design. The centers deliver R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting, HR and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all six decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Black & Veatch operate in India?
faq.a: Black & Veatch operates 2 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Black & Veatch have centers in?
faq.a: Black & Veatch's India footprint includes Mumbai and 1 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does Black & Veatch run in India?
faq.a: Black & Veatch runs engineering & design centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Black & Veatch's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Black & Veatch's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Black & Veatch's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Black & Veatch's India centers, across IT and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
